His eyes moisten as he says he is beginning to feel like his life is starting to fall apart at home and at work. He has been late in completing two assignments in the past week, although his supervisor has given him a grace period to get caught up. His mounting problems led him to think he needs some help, leading to the current visit.
Additional Background Information:  KF has been happily married for the past 15 years. Up until this point of his life, he has always performed very well at work. NS reports that she has a sense that she will not recover on this occasion or ever work again. She says that she feels guilty about becoming a burden on others and frequently wishes that she were dead, rather than living to witness such bad times. However, she says that she has lacked the energy to act on these thoughts.

The first two episodes resolved completely with treatment within 2 months, but the most recent one—which was 2 years ago—lasted 6 months.
